jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Frontend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
